titleStmt.title: SII 42.42: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 42. (A.R. No. B. 53 of 1953-54.) Uḷchāla, Kurnool Taluk, Kurnool District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab near the centre of the village.
Dated in Śaka 1480, Kāḷayukti, Māgha, śu. 7, corresponding to 1559 A.D., January 16.

Registers a bhaṭa-mānya of land sowable with one tūmu of seed to Bhaṭṭa-Tippayya by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Māḍrāju Narasarājayyadēva-māhārāja. The gift land lay in Vuluchala situated in Kandanōli (Kandanavōli)-sīma granted to the donor as amara-nāyaṅkara by Rāmarāju Veṅkaṭādrirājayyadēva-mahārāja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrī jayābhyu
daya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu
1480 Agunēṭi kāḷayukti saṁvatsara mā
gha śu 7 lu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍḍalēśvara māḍrāju
narasarājayyadēva mahārājulayyavāru ba(bha)ṭṭu tippayaku
yiccina bhaṭamānyapu śāsanakramameṭlannanu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalē
śvara rāmarāju veṁkkaṭādri rājayyadēva mahārājayyavāTo the right of this line and that of lines 8-10, the stone has peeled
rikiṁ jellivaccē kaṁdanōli sīmalōnu Ā veṁkkaṭādri rāja
yyadēva mahārājulayyavāru māku Amaranāyaṁkarāna
ku pāliṁcci yiccina Ā kaṁddanōli sīmalōnu vulu[calagrāma-]
munu Āgrāmānaku Āgnēyaṁ voṁddēlivāri yīḍubētaṁ
li teruvuku vu(U)ttaraṁ jaṁmmimānisthaḷa bījavari 1 tūmeṁḍu
vittanālu pārēṭi polaṁ nīku timinī putra pautra
pāraṁparyamaunaṭṭugānu Ācaṁdrā[rkkasthāyigānu Anubha]Right portion in lines 14-18 has faded out.
viṁcci bradi(ti)kēdi Ani vēyiṁccina dharmma śāsanaṁ
vēyiṁccina sarvamānyaṁ . Iṁdu
ṁcinānu tamatalidaṁḍrulanu
kāśilō vadhiIṁcina pāpānabōvuvā
rū
Digital edition of SII 42.42 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
